request: You are Reviewer R7: node lifecycle, sync safety, GitHub recovery reviewer for DinoBrain. Work read-only. Inspect <machine-local-path> docs\OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md, docs\OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs\SYNC_POLICY.md, docs\VERIFICATION.md, install.ps1, lifecycle/sync code found by rg 'auto_sync|git_sync|apply_node_lifecycle|sync_policy|task:lifecycle|settle', and relevant data state artifacts. Judge whether the unfinished-work plan completion conditions are enough for merge/promote/hold/delete/provenance, policy push, data safety, reinstall/idempotence, and new-PC/GitHub equivalence. Return reviewer_id=R7, verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED, blocking_objections[], required_doc_changes[], evidence_files[].
